title: Weighted Motif Intensity & Sign-Coherence Features for Capability Clustering
summary: Demo notebook for weighted motif intensity & sign-coherence features on Neuronpedia attribution graphs. Loads pre-computed per-graph features (24 examples across 8 capability domains), compares 5 feature sets via spectral clustering NMI/ARI, runs permutation tests, ANOVA discriminative analysis, weight-topology interactions, and sign-coherence patterns. Includes 4-panel visualization of clustering quality, NMI vs K, top discriminative features, and sign coherence by domain. Weighted motif features achieve NMI=0.777, significantly beating binary baseline NMI=0.529 (p=0.02).
